meaning: n.[宗]乌列(基督教<<圣经>>和伊斯兰教<<古兰经>>所载天使长之一)
examples: His mother's name was Maacah, a daughter of Uriel of Gibeah.
Of the sons of Kohath; Uriel the chief, and his brethren an hundred and twenty.
For years, Uriel has been putting his father up for the Israel Prize without success.
"These organizations, these cartels, they function like a Fortune 500 company, " Webb County, Texas, prosecutor Uriel Druker said.
